"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent identifies and maps against several prior works, clearly articulating the deltas.",
  "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
  "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty for specific claims and marks confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output mostly stays within scope but drifts slightly in discussing empirical results.",
  "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content are introduced, and potential issues are identified.",
  "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability are not addressed; changes lack source annotations."
},

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies and maps against several prior works, clearly articulating the deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty for specific claims and marks confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within scope but drifts slightly in discussing empirical results.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced, and potential issues are identified.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are not addressed; changes lack source annotations.
